Reviews Contact

About Summit Auto Detailing

12+ years serving Savannah and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Summit Auto Detailing began with a single goal: to combat Savannah’s harsh coastal elements with meticulous paint corrections and interior shield treatments. Our team grew from a two-car garage near Starland District to a 20-person crew serving all of Chatham County.

We approach detailing as preservationists—removing salt residues before they etch, conditioning sun-baked leather before it cracks, and neutralizing mold spores trapped in humid interiors. Every swirl mark matters here.

When we’re not restoring vintage Corvettes from the Historic District or detailing family SUVs in Pooler, we sponsor youth programs at Forsyth Park and donate detailing services to local first responders.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Auto Detailing

Trusted auto detailing professionals serving Savannah, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-aut-r91
